classes.source_only: No DB, Blob, Stripe, email, production URL, or live credential side effects expected.
classes.local_runtime: Requires local app/runtime process only; must not target production.
classes.db_local_only: Requires DATABASE_URL and may read/write DB; must use local/disposable database unless explicitly approved.
classes.human_approved_live_or_sensitive: Blocked by default; requires human approval, scoped credentials, and cleanup/rollback plan.
